tool_calls.name: execute_js
tool_calls.input: {"code":"const allPrs = github.list_pull_requests({ state: 'open' }); const totalOpenPrs = allPrs.length; const repoCounts = new Map(); allPrs.forEach(pr => { const repo = pr.repo; const count = repoCounts.get(repo) || 0; repoCounts.set(repo, count + 1); }); const maxRepo = [...repoCounts.entries()].reduce((a, b) => a[1] > b[1] ? a : b); [totalOpenPrs, maxRepo[0], maxRepo[1]]"}

text:
(a) There are exactly 17 open pull requests across all repositories.
